subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Quli! By the life of God, thou must needs glory in the world, for thou hast heard that which none before thee hath heard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قلی لعمر الله باید در عالم فخر نمائی شنیدی آنچه را که از قبل احدی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
